title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
company: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
